stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
(For this question use VFR chart ED-4 from the Jeppesen GSPRM 2017).
Which option gives the correct type, identification, and frequency of a navigation aid?

options.a: VOR, RODING, 114.70 MHz (near N49°00<sup>ı</sup>, E012°30<sup> ı</sup>)
options.b: VOR/DME, RDG, 114.70 MHz (near N49°00<sup>ı</sup>, E012°30<sup> ı</sup>)
options.c: VOR, LKSR, 123.50 MHz (near N49°00<sup>ı</sup>, E014°00<sup> ı</sup>)
options.d: VOR, END, 393 kHz (near N48°30<sup>ı</sup>, E012°30<sup> ı</sup>)
